description: Three country cards side by side each with animated border draw, stat, and label. Each card uses a different theme color.

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Title above, e.g. 'TOP STATE-SPONSORED THREAT ACTORS'
fields.MAP_LABEL_1: Country 1 key: USA, UK, RUSSIA, CHINA, NORTHKOREA, IRAN, UKRAINE, ISRAEL, KENYA, GERMANY
fields.LABEL_1: Stat label for country 1, e.g. 'STOLEN IN 2023'
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: Source or context line below the three cards
